project.name: manamaths-te-reo
project.purpose: Track te reo Māori mathematical terms gathered for each Mana Maths Year 9 learning objective and extension, and the Te Aka links that will appear first in each objective module.

term_module_rule.placement: Show first on each learning objective page/module.

progress_rules.completion_definition: Complete means the learning objective or extension has 3-4 suitable mathematical terms, each with a specific Te Aka word URL, and is ready to be added as the first module block for that objective.

source_notes: Referenced NZQAMathematicsTermsMao-Eng.pdf for term candidates.
Using specific Te Aka word URLs for website links.
